message:
fix: file locking race condition and clippy warnings

- auth.rs: Fixed race condition where file lock was acquired on one
  handle but I/O performed through separate handles. Refactored to
  LockedFile struct that owns the file and provides mutable access
  while holding the lock.

- interactive.rs: Removed redundant clone on message_owned before
  pushing to history.

- resources.rs: Fixed multiple clippy warnings including excessive
  bools, const fn, implicit clone, is_some_and/is_ok_and patterns,
  if-not-else, let-else pattern, and map_or_else.

- main.rs: Changed cwd.to_path_buf() to cwd.clone() to fix implicit
  clone warning.

- Cargo.toml: Removed non-existent http2 feature from asupersync,
  updated rusqlite from 0.32 to 0.33 to resolve version conflict.

All tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
